title: Gentle Crisp Greek Oysters Spanakopita
description: A vegan-friendly, herbal, and crisp Greek dish featuring oysters in a spanakopita form, utilizing sous-vide cooking for a tender and light texture. This dish is perfect for a special occasion or a unique dinner party.
instructions: Preheat the sous-vide machine to 130 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the oyster mushrooms until tender.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked mushrooms, spinach, lemon juice, thyme, salt, and pepper, and mix well.
Layer the phylo dough in a large baking dish, brushing each layer with olive oil.
Add the mushroom and spinach mixture to the phylo dough, topping with vegan feta cheese.
Fold the phylo dough over the filling, brushing with olive oil to seal.
Place the spanakopita in the sous-vide machine and cook for 30 minutes.
Remove the spanakopita from the sous-vide machine and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Slice the spanakopita into individual servings and serve hot.
